summary: Phase 54 Testing: Guided Navigation + Field Rendering Overflow. All tests passed. Start/Next buttons now traverse ALL interactive fields (signature, text, date, checkbox, radio, initials) not just required ones. Finish button and counter still key off required fields only. Overflow containment verified - all field wrappers have overflow:hidden + box-sizing:border-box.
critical_code_review_comments: useGuidedFillIn.js: Correctly splits navigableFields (all interactive) from requiredFields (required only). navigableFields excludes labels and non-interactive merge fields, includes merge-with-fallbackToInput. Skip rules properly check field_hidden, field_disabled, readOnly, and unassigned fields.

PublicDocumentViewEnhanced.js: showStart/showNext now use hasAnyNavigable + navUnfilledCount (navigable-based). canFinish unchanged (required-based). pendingCount displays required field count only. Progress bar only shows when hasAnyRequired is true.

InteractiveDocumentViewer.js: resolveResponsiveFontSize helper scales font down for small boxes (heightCap = 70% of height-4px, widthCap = width/3). Both page-mode and scroll-mode render loops have overflow:hidden + boxSizing:border-box on field wrappers. Signature/initials use object-contain for image scaling. Text/date/merge fields use whiteSpace:nowrap + truncate for ellipsis.
All 3 files pass ESLint with no issues.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 54 verified: (1) Guided navigation Start/Next now traverse ALL interactive fields (not just required).
